Trailing Stop Loss.title: Trailing Stop Loss
Trailing Stop Loss.description: A trailing stop loss locks in profits as the price moves in your favor. Suggested action: trail stop at {suggested_trailing_pct}% below recent moving average or latest peak.

Breakout.title: Breakout
Breakout.description: Breakout confirmed above resistance. Suggested action: consider partial profit booking and set trailing stop at {suggested_trailing_pct}%.

Moving Average Breakout.title: Moving Average Breakout
Moving Average Breakout.description: Price crossed above its short vs long moving average — trend may be starting. Suggested action: consider a trailing stop at {suggested_trailing_pct}%.
Moving Average Breakout.notes: Use this when momentum is building and the price is above both the short and medium-term moving averages.

Double Top.title: Double Top
Double Top.description: Price formed two similar peaks with a valley between — this can signal a reversal. Suggested action: tighten stops or consider reducing position; suggested trailing stop {suggested_trailing_pct}%.
Double Top.notes: Watch the support level between the tops; a breakdown below it can confirm the reversal.

Double Bottom.title: Double Bottom
Double Bottom.description: Price formed two similar lows with a peak between — this can signal a bullish reversal. Suggested action: consider entry on breakout above resistance with a tight trailing stop of {suggested_trailing_pct}%.
Double Bottom.notes: Confirmation comes when price breaks above the peak between the two lows.

Head and Shoulders.title: Head and Shoulders
Head and Shoulders.description: Classic reversal pattern (left shoulder - head - right shoulder). Suggested action: defensive trailing stop and consider exit if neckline breaks. Suggested trailing stop {suggested_trailing_pct}%.
Head and Shoulders.notes: The neckline is the critical support level; a decisive break signals the pattern.

Cup and Handle.title: Cup and Handle
Cup and Handle.description: Price formed a rounded base followed by a shallow pullback. Suggested action: prepare for a breakout advance with a trailing stop at {suggested_trailing_pct}%.

Ascending Triangle.title: Ascending Triangle
Ascending Triangle.description: Higher lows and flat resistance can precede an upside breakout. Suggested action: watch for a breakout above resistance and trail stop at {suggested_trailing_pct}%.
Ascending Triangle.notes: A bullish breakout above resistance is the primary signal; keep stops below rising lows.

Descending Triangle.title: Descending Triangle
Descending Triangle.description: Lower highs and flat support can precede a downside move. Suggested action: use a defensive stop at {suggested_trailing_pct}% and wait for a confirmed break.
Descending Triangle.notes: A breakdown below the flat support is the key trigger for continuation.

Bull Flag.title: Bull Flag
Bull Flag.description: A sharp advance followed by a narrow consolidation suggests continuation higher. Suggested action: prioritize momentum and keep a tight trailing stop of {suggested_trailing_pct}%.
Bull Flag.notes: The consolidation should be short and shallow after a strong run-up.

Bear Flag.title: Bear Flag
Bear Flag.description: A sharp drop followed by a small corrective rally suggests continuation lower. Suggested action: avoid fresh longs and consider a trailing stop of {suggested_trailing_pct}% if holding shorts.

Bullish Engulfing.title: Bullish Engulfing
Bullish Engulfing.description: A bullish reversal candle engulfs the prior bearish candle. Suggested action: consider a long bias with a stop near the engulfed low at {suggested_trailing_pct}%.

Bearish Engulfing.title: Bearish Engulfing
Bearish Engulfing.description: A bearish reversal candle engulfs the prior bullish candle. Suggested action: consider a defensive stance or short bias with a stop at {suggested_trailing_pct}%.
